expectedAnswers: I've had a stomachache for two days and I'm feeling tired.
My stomach's been hurting since Wednesday, and I don't have much energy.
Stomach pain and fatigue — started two days ago.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确描述了至少一个身体症状和持续时间
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了完成时态（have had）和恰当的词汇
表达自然度：使用了口语化表达如'stomach's been hurting'或简洁并列结构

expectedAnswers: No fever, but I've been feeling a bit dizzy.
I didn't check, but yeah, I'm a little nauseous.
No fever. Maybe a little nauseous — not sure though.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰回应了两个症状（有/无发烧、有/无恶心）
语言准确性：正确使用了but/yeha/maybe等口语连接词
表达自然度：语气自然，符合真实医患对话的不确定性和简洁性
